scripts.observability:config: docker compose -f compose.prod.yaml -f compose.observability.yaml --profile observability config
scripts.observability:up: docker compose -f compose.prod.yaml -f compose.observability.yaml --profile observability up -d prometheus grafana
scripts.observability:down: docker compose -f compose.prod.yaml -f compose.observability.yaml --profile observability stop prometheus grafana
scripts.observability:logs: docker compose -f compose.prod.yaml -f compose.observability.yaml --profile observability logs -f prometheus grafana
scripts.ops:notify:test: ALERT_STATUS=info ALERT_TITLE='Polywatch test alert' ALERT_TEXT='This is a test notification from the local workspace.' ALERT_SOURCE=local-dev bash scripts/ops-notify.sh
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @polywatch/shared && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n shared,api,web -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @polywatch/shared" "npm run dev -w @polywatch/api" "npm run dev -w @polywatch/web"
scripts.dev:restart: npm run dev:reset && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build -w @polywatch/shared && npm run build -w @polywatch/api && npm run build -w @polywatch/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @polywatch/shared && npm run typecheck -w @polywatch/api && npm run typecheck -w @polywatch/web
